Flow.interviewLabel: Vetting and Compliance - RMG - 5 Year History {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Vetting and Compliance - RMG - 5 Year History

fields.name: Header_Text2
fields.fieldText: 5 YEAR ACTIVITY HISTORY

value.stringValue: Please choose from the below Activity Types

fields.name: Activty_other
fields.fieldText: Please provide the other reason below

fields.name: Reason_Leaving
fields.fieldText: What was your reason for leaving

validationRule.errorMessage: This date must be before the "To" date below

fields.name: Header_Text2_0
fields.fieldText: 5 YEAR ACTIVITY HISTORY

fields.name: Unemployed_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Any gaps in the information provided will be treated as unemployment and by confirming below you agree that any periods of unemployment where supported by one of the following:

  • Savings
  • Pension
  • Redundancy Payment
  • Family/Partner support
  • Loan
  • Government benefits

fields.name: Header_Text
fields.fieldText: 5 YEAR ACTIVITY HISTORY

fields.name: Success_Text
fields.fieldText:
✔

Status: Completed

Date: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Document_Completed_Date__c}

fields.name: trex3
fields.fieldText: In order to be eligible for Royal Mail assignments we require a full history of what you have been doing over the past 5 years, this will include periods where you have been absent from employment such as un-employment, education etc. once finished make sure to use the "Mark as Complete" button to submit the details

textTemplates.name: DocumentTextFinal
textTemplates.text:
5 YEAR ACTIVITY HISTORY

Status: Completed

Completed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

{!DocumentText}

Any gaps in the information provided will be treated as unemployment and by confirming below you agree that any periods of unemployment where supported by one of the following:

  • Savings
  • Pension
  • Redundancy Payment
  • Family/Partner support
  • Loan
  • Government benefits

﻿Confirmed By: {!Get_Candidate.Name}

Confirmed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDate}

textTemplates.name: SupportingTextEmployed
textTemplates.text:
Activity Type: {!Activity_Type.value}

Employer: {!Employer}

Job Role: {!Role}

Reason for leaving: {!Reason_Leaving}

From: {!From}

To: {!To2}

﻿

textTemplates.name: SupportingTextOther
textTemplates.text:
Activity Type: {!Activity_Type.value}

From: {!From}

To: {!To2}
